economic_notes: Cross Lake Mineral Exploration Inc. is a wholly-owned private corporation for developing interest in local natural resources including the Pipestone Vanadium Project. TreeSuns Junction Inc. holds Pontoon Service Station (1992) Ltd (gas station) and My's Est. 93 Ltd (restaurant), both fully owned and operated off reserve. No operational results for 2024 or 2019.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - auditors were unable to obtain sufficient appropriate audit evidence related to the investment in Cross Lake Mineral Exploration Inc., therefore unable to determine if adjustments would be required to investment in government business entities and accumulated surplus. Prior year audited by another firm in Winnipeg, Manitoba. The prior year comparative statements did not include financial operations of Pontoon Service Station (1992) Ltd. and My's Est. 93 Ltd. TreeSuns Junction Inc. has been fully consolidated in current year following an accounting policy change effective April 1, 2024. Nation is located in Manitoba. Twelve reportable segments. RBC loan of $10,262,384 repayable monthly. CMHC housing mortgages are major component of long-term debt. Hospital project restricted cash of $6,180,224. Text encoding in document is heavily obfuscated making precise extraction of all figures uncertain.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
High ISC dependency (88.26%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
